_comment: Tests Beyond Physio's mandatory ACC/Private gate, location gate for ACC new patient, pelvic health skipping ACC/Private gate, and Scan P (pelvic + practitioner cross-path).

scenarios.name: Standard physio request — must ask ACC or private before routing

history.content: I need to book a physiotherapy appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Is this appointment funded by ACC or is it a private appointment?' as a spoken-only turn before any routing. FAIL if agent routes to any confirm_service call, asks location first, or asks new/existing before asking ACC/Private.

scenarios.name: ACC new patient — must ask location after ACC confirmed

history.content: I need to book a physiotherapy appointment.
Is this appointment funded by ACC or is it a private appointment?
Have you been to us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks the location question ('Which of our locations works for you -- Tauranga or Papamoa?') as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent calls confirm_service without asking location, or assumes Tauranga.

scenarios.name: ACC stated in opening message — gate must be skipped

history.content: Could I have an initial physiotherapy ACC appointment for Saturday?
Sure. Is this appointment for you, or for someone else?
Great. Have you had physio with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent does NOT ask 'Is this funded by ACC or private?' and instead proceeds to the Senior/regular gate (since ACC + returning patient = ACC TURN 2 Senior Gate). FAIL if agent asks the ACC/Private gate question — the caller already said ACC in the opening message.

scenarios.name: Pelvic health — skips ACC/Private gate entirely

history.content: I'd like to book a pelvic floor physio appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent enters the Pelvic Health branch and asks the initial/follow-up qualifier question without asking ACC/Private first. FAIL if agent asks 'Is this funded by ACC or private?' before addressing pelvic floor, or routes to standard physio.

scenarios.name: Scan P PART 2 — pelvic variant answer after practitioner named (new patient with Sam Grey)

history.content: I'd like to book a women's pelvic health appointment.
Have you had Women's Pelvic Health physio with us before?
Sam is great, I'd love to see her.
Have you had Women's Pelvic Health physio with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls confirm_service with appointment_type='Women's Pelvic Health Initial Appointment', appointment_type_id='1196722922010444895', patient_status='new', variant_type='initial', business_name='Beyond Physio & Fitness', business_id='76002', and practitioner_preference='Sam Grey'. FAIL if agent asks any question instead of calling confirm_service, or omits practitioner_preference, or uses the wrong appointment type.

scenarios.name: Regression — practitioner named with no prior pelvic context (Scan P must NOT fire)

history.content: I'd like to book a physio appointment with Sam Grey.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent enters PRACTITIONER PATH (not Scan P) and asks ACC or private gate question, since no prior 'Women's Pelvic Health' appears in the conversation history. FAIL if agent asks 'Have you had Women's Pelvic Health physio with us before?' — that would mean Scan P PART 1 fired incorrectly when there was no prior pelvic context.
